title: Get up to 100% of your investment back
subtitle: Your hand slipped and the position opened at the wrong time? You accidentally selected the wrong asset? The chart isn’t moving in your favor? Don’t despair - just sell the option back to us!
text-1: Within 3 seconds of opening an option you are able to cancel it prior to the expiration time. YOU GET 100% OF YOUR INVESTMENT BACK if the price did not change in those 3 seconds.
text-2:
After 3 seconds have passed you can sell the option back to us for a suggested price.
With IQ Option you can lower the risks and protect your investments.
